characters.name: Dave
characters.description: DaveGeneral informationRelativesStew(father)Debbie(mother)Joanna(sister)Marital statusMarried toRebeccaPortrayed byAdam PallyDaveis one of the main characters on the NBC comedy series,Indebted. He is played byAdam Pally. He is married to Rebecca and the two were going to start a new life after years of parenting but are interrupted when his parents show up unannounced and broke.
